title: MTRO
description: Some Stupid/Clever name I came up with (MTRO) "Mods To Replace Optifine"
body:
# MTRO

MTRO, short for "Mods To Replace Optifine," is the Modpack you've been waiting for. It's purpose-built to replace OptiFine, making your Minecraft adventures smoother and more visually stunning. No longer must you make the tough choice between peak performance and beautiful graphics because MTRO delivers both.

Prepare for a Minecraft experience like never before. MTRO seamlessly integrates top-notch Fabric mods, resulting in a significant boost in FPS. Thanks to the Iris mod, you can now enjoy silky-smooth gameplay while still reveling in the beauty of shaders.

With MTRO, you're not just playing Minecraft, you're immersing yourself in a greatly improved experience. Dive into the Minecraft world with MTRO and explore, build, and lose yourself in an environment that's been visually enhanced. Get ready to enjoy Minecraft in a way you never thought possible!

## Modlist
